outlook_paragraph: SM shows reduced satellite-derived drilling activity with only 3 active sites at decision date, all continuously active and none newly activated, resulting in a negative relative activity delta of -1.5. This suggests weakening operational momentum heading into the final quarter of 2021. With WTI averaging around $45/bbl and realized prices discounted at 88% of benchmark, revenue is further constrained by only 55% exposure to the most active segment. The deterministic revenue forecast is set at approximately $428.2 million, reflecting both subdued drilling trends and moderate price conditions.
